code:
import io
import string

let s_opt = io.read_line()
let n_opt = io.read_line()

mut s = ""
match s_opt
when Some(v)
  s = v
when None
  s = ""
end

mut n = 0
match n_opt
when Some(v)
  match string.parse_int(v)
  when Some(k)
    n = k
  when None
    n = 0
  end
when None
  n = 0
end

mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  result = "#{result}#{s}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
